foundations.label: Execution Runtime

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.addresses.add
actions.description: Add a receiving address for a chain+token pair (owner only)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.addresses.list
actions.description: List x402 merchant receiving addresses

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.addresses.remove
actions.description: Remove a receiving address by chain and token symbol (owner only)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.api-keys.get
actions.description: View API key info (secret is masked)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.api-keys.rotate
actions.description: Rotate API keys (invalidates current keys immediately, owner only). Save the new api_secret from response!

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.audit-logs.list
actions.description: Get merchant audit logs (profile, address, webhook, key rotation events)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.auth.login
actions.description: Login to x402 merchant portal and obtain access/refresh tokens. Use the returned access_token in subsequent action calls.

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.auth.refresh
actions.description: Refresh x402 merchant portal access token using a refresh token. Use the returned access_token in subsequent action calls.

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.auth.register-invite
actions.description: Register on x402 merchant portal using an invite code (auto-approved). Use the returned access_token in subsequent action calls.

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.auth.register
actions.description: Register a new merchant on the x402 merchant portal (pending admin approval)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.balance.fees-config
actions.description: Get x402 merchant fee configuration per chain

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.balance.get
actions.description: Get x402 merchant fee balance

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.balance.transactions
actions.description: Get x402 merchant balance transactions (paginated)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.callback-contracts.cancel-submission
actions.description: Cancel a pending callback contract submission (owner only)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.callback-contracts.list
actions.description: List callback contracts (active + pending/rejected submissions, DELEGATE mode)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.callback-contracts.remove
actions.description: Remove an active callback contract (owner only, blocked if in-flight orders exist)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.callback-contracts.submit
actions.description: Submit a callback contract for admin review (owner only, DELEGATE mode)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.dashboard.stats
actions.description: Get merchant dashboard statistics (revenue, order counts, recent orders)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.invite-codes.create
actions.description: Create a single-use invite code for a new member (owner only)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.invite-codes.list
actions.description: List merchant invite codes (owner only)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.invite-codes.revoke
actions.description: Revoke an unused invite code (owner only)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.orders.get
actions.description: Get x402 merchant order details (includes payment and payout info)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.orders.list
actions.description: List x402 merchant orders with optional filters (status, flow, chain, date range)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.profile.get
actions.description: Get x402 merchant profile information

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.profile.update
actions.description: Update x402 merchant profile (name and logo only, owner only)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.supported-tokens.list
actions.description: List system-supported chains and tokens (chain_id, symbol, decimals, explorer)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.webhooks.create
actions.description: Create a new webhook endpoint (owner only). Save the webhook secret from response!

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.webhooks.delete
actions.description: Delete a webhook endpoint (owner only)

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.webhooks.list
actions.description: List x402 merchant webhooks

actions.name: goat.x402.merchant.webhooks.update
actions.description: Update a webhook (toggle enabled, change URL or events, owner only)

actions.name: goat.bitvm2.bridge.deposit
actions.description: Start BTC L1 -> Goat L2 deposit via BitVM2 bridge

actions.name: goat.bitvm2.bridge.status
actions.description: Track BitVM2 bridge request status

actions.name: goat.bitvm2.bridge.withdraw
actions.description: Start Goat L2 -> BTC L1 withdraw via BitVM2 bridge

actions.name: goat.bitvm2.pegbtc.balance
actions.description: Get PegBTC token balance for an address. PegBTC is the BitVM2 bridge token on Goat Network.

actions.name: goat.bitvm2.pegin.request
actions.description: Request a peg-in (BTC L1 → Goat L2) via the BitVM2 bridge. Submits a peg-in request to GoatChain. After requesting, the user must deposit BTC on L1 to the generated address. Minimum deposit: 50,000 sats. Operator graph prepayment: ~10,000 sats.

actions.name: goat.bitvm2.pegout.initiate
actions.description: Initiate a peg-out (Goat L2 → BTC L1) via the BitVM2 bridge Gateway.initWithdraw. Requires a running Operator node. The operator will process the withdrawal and send BTC on L1.

actions.name: goat.bitvm2.stake.approve
actions.description: Approve PegBTC tokens for the BitVM2 StakeManagement contract. This is the second step in the staking flow (after registerPubkey). The amount must be >= the amount you intend to stake.

actions.name: goat.bitvm2.stake.lock
actions.description: Lock staked PegBTC in the BitVM2 StakeManagement contract. This is the fourth and final step in the staking flow. Minimum lock amount is 0.06 PBTC (60000000000000000 wei). Each disprove slash costs 0.03 PBTC. The locked amount must be <= staked amount.

actions.name: goat.bitvm2.stake.register_pubkey
actions.description: Register an x-only public key (32 bytes) with the BitVM2 StakeManagement contract. This is the first step in the staking flow. X-only pubkeys are derived by removing the leading 02/03 prefix from a compressed 33-byte public key.

actions.name: goat.bitvm2.stake.stake
actions.description: Stake PegBTC tokens with the BitVM2 StakeManagement contract. This is the third step in the staking flow (after approve). The amount must be <= previously approved amount.

actions.name: wallet.approve_erc20
actions.description: Approve ERC20 token spending allowance for a spender address

actions.name: wallet.balance
actions.description: Query wallet balance (native token when tokenAddress absent, ERC20 otherwise)

actions.name: wallet.contract_read
actions.description: Read data from a smart contract (view/pure function call)

actions.name: wallet.contract_write
actions.description: Write to a smart contract (state-changing function call)

actions.name: wallet.deploy_contract
actions.description: Deploy a smart contract on-chain given its ABI and bytecode

actions.name: wallet.get_allowance
actions.description: Query ERC20 token allowance for a given owner and spender

actions.name: wallet.get_details
actions.description: Get wallet details including address, network, and native balance

actions.name: wallet.resolve_token
actions.description: Resolve a token symbol to its on-chain contract address

actions.name: wallet.transfer_erc20
actions.description: Transfer ERC20 tokens to an address

actions.name: wallet.transfer_native
actions.description: Transfer native token (e.g. ETH/BTC) to an address

actions.name: erc8004.get_agent_wallet
actions.description: Get the linked wallet address for an agent from the ERC-8004 Identity Registry

actions.name: erc8004.get_clients
actions.description: Get the list of client addresses that have submitted feedback for an agent in the ERC-8004 Reputation Registry

actions.name: erc8004.get_metadata
actions.description: Read a metadata entry for an agent from the ERC-8004 Identity Registry

actions.name: erc8004.get_reputation
actions.description: Get the reputation summary for an agent from the ERC-8004 Reputation Registry. Filter by client addresses and tags. Pass empty arrays/strings for no filter.

actions.name: erc8004.give_feedback
actions.description: Submit feedback for an agent in the ERC-8004 Reputation Registry. Value is a signed integer with decimals (e.g. value=87, decimals=0 for a score of 87; value=9977, decimals=2 for 99.77%).

actions.name: erc8004.register_agent
actions.description: Register a new agent in the ERC-8004 Identity Registry. Returns the transaction hash. The agentURI should point to a JSON registration file describing the agent.

actions.name: erc8004.revoke_feedback
actions.description: Revoke previously submitted feedback for an agent in the ERC-8004 Reputation Registry. Only the original feedback submitter can revoke.

actions.name: erc8004.set_agent_uri
actions.description: Update the registration URI for an agent in the ERC-8004 Identity Registry. Only the agent owner can call this.

actions.name: erc8004.set_metadata
actions.description: Set a metadata entry for an agent in the ERC-8004 Identity Registry. Only the agent owner can call this.

actions.name: bridge.cancel
actions.description: Cancel a pending Bridge withdrawal by its ID

actions.name: bridge.deposit_status
actions.description: Check whether a Bitcoin deposit has been credited on Goat Network

actions.name: bridge.get_params
actions.description: Get the current deposit and withdrawal parameters from the Bridge contract

actions.name: bridge.refund
actions.description: Refund a cancelled Bridge withdrawal by its ID

actions.name: bridge.replace_by_fee
actions.description: Replace a pending Bridge withdrawal with a higher Bitcoin transaction fee

actions.name: bridge.withdraw
actions.description: Withdraw BTC from Goat Network to a Bitcoin address via the Bridge contract

actions.name: bridge.withdrawal_status
actions.description: Query the status of a Bridge withdrawal by its ID

actions.name: dex.add_liquidity
actions.description: Add liquidity to a Uniswap V3 pool on Goat Network via OKU PositionManager

actions.name: dex.collect_fees
actions.description: Collect accumulated fees from a Uniswap V3 position on Goat Network via OKU PositionManager

actions.name: dex.get_pool
actions.description: Look up a Uniswap V3 pool address on Goat Network via OKU V3Factory

actions.name: dex.get_position
actions.description: Get details of a Uniswap V3 liquidity position on Goat Network via OKU PositionManager

actions.name: dex.quote
actions.description: Get a price quote for a Uniswap V3 swap on Goat Network via OKU QuoterV2

actions.name: dex.remove_liquidity
actions.description: Remove liquidity from a Uniswap V3 position on Goat Network via OKU PositionManager

actions.name: dex.swap
actions.description: Execute a Uniswap V3 exact-input single swap on Goat Network via OKU SwapRouter02

actions.name: goat.x402.payment.cancel
actions.description: Cancel x402 payment via merchant gateway API

actions.name: goat.x402.payment.create
actions.description: Create x402 payment intent via merchant gateway API

actions.name: goat.x402.payment.status
actions.description: Get x402 payment status via merchant gateway API

actions.name: goat.x402.payment.submitSignature
actions.description: Submit payer signature to merchant gateway (supports EIP-712 signing)

actions.name: goat.x402.payment.transfer
actions.description: Execute payer wallet token transfer to merchant payToAddress

actions.name: bitcoin.block_hash
actions.description: Get the Bitcoin block hash at a given height from the on-chain oracle

actions.name: bitcoin.latest_height
actions.description: Get the latest Bitcoin block height known to the on-chain oracle

actions.name: bitcoin.network_name
actions.description: Get the Bitcoin network name (e.g. mainnet, testnet3) from the on-chain oracle

actions.name: erc721.balance
actions.description: Query ERC721 NFT balance for an address

actions.name: erc721.mint
actions.description: Mint a new ERC721 NFT to an address

actions.name: erc721.transfer
actions.description: Transfer an ERC721 NFT from one address to another

actions.name: goat_token.delegate
actions.description: Delegate GOAT token voting power to the specified address

actions.name: goat_token.get_delegates
actions.description: Get the address that a given account has delegated their GOAT voting power to

actions.name: goat_token.get_votes
actions.description: Get the current voting power of an address for the GOAT governance token

actions.name: oft.quote_oft
actions.description: Get detailed OFT quote including transfer limits and fee breakdown for a LayerZero cross-chain transfer from Goat Network

actions.name: oft.quote_send
actions.description: Estimate the messaging fee for a LayerZero OFT cross-chain token transfer from Goat Network

actions.name: oft.send
actions.description: Execute a LayerZero OFT cross-chain token transfer from Goat Network to another chain

actions.name: wgbtc.balance
actions.description: Query WGBTC token balance for an address

actions.name: wgbtc.unwrap
actions.description: Unwrap WGBTC back to native BTC by calling withdraw on the WGBTC contract

actions.name: wgbtc.wrap
actions.description: Wrap native BTC into WGBTC by sending BTC to the WGBTC contract

actions.name: faucet.get_chains
actions.description: List available chains supported by the Goat testnet faucet

actions.name: faucet.request_funds
actions.description: Request testnet tokens from the Goat faucet

openaiAgents.description: Register a new agent in the ERC-8004 Identity Registry. Returns the transaction hash. The agentURI should point to a JSON registration file describing the agent.

openaiAgents.name: goat.x402.merchant.auth.register
openaiAgents.description: Register a new merchant on the x402 merchant portal (pending admin approval)

openaiAgents.name: goat.x402.merchant.dashboard.stats
openaiAgents.description: Get merchant dashboard statistics (revenue, order counts, recent orders)

openaiAgents.name: goat.x402.merchant.orders.list
openaiAgents.description: List x402 merchant orders with optional filters (status, flow, chain, date range)

openaiAgents.name: goat.x402.merchant.webhooks.create
openaiAgents.description: Create a new webhook endpoint (owner only). Save the webhook secret from response!
